discount_window.name: Federal Reserve Discount Window
discount_window.contact: Your regional Federal Reserve Bank discount window department
discount_window.notes: Any FDIC-insured bank qualifies. Collateral must be pre-pledged before crisis hits. Eligible collateral includes loans, Treasuries, and agency MBS. Primary credit rate applies.

fhlb_advance.name: Federal Home Loan Bank Advance
fhlb_advance.contact: Your district Federal Home Loan Bank membership services office
fhlb_advance.notes: Fastest and cheapest liquidity option for member banks. Secured by residential mortgage loan portfolio. Terms range from overnight to 30 years. Rates typically below market.

cdfi_fund.name: CDFI Fund Financial Assistance Grant
cdfi_fund.notes: Free capital — no repayment required. Requires active CDFI certification. Applications open annually, typically spring. Awards range from $500K to $5M. Best for long-term capital building, not immediate crisis.
